entities.name: PONGAMIA GLABRA
entities.description: A tree also known as karanja, whose seeds and oil have various industrial and agricultural applications.

entities.name: KARANJIN
entities.description: A chemical constituent of Pongamia glabra used as a nitrification inhibitor.

entities.name: NITRIFICATION INHIBITOR
entities.description: A substance that slows the conversion of ammonium to nitrate in the soil.

entities.name: KARANJA OIL
entities.description: Oil extracted from the seeds of Pongamia glabra used in soap making and as a solvent.

entities.name: SYNERGIST-CUM-SOLVENT
entities.description: A substance that enhances the effect of another and acts as a solvent for chemical agents.

entities.name: CHLORINATED INSECTICIDES
entities.description: A class of insecticides for which karanja oil acts as a synergist-cum-solvent.

entities.name: KARANJA CAKE MEAL
entities.description: A byproduct of oil extraction from Pongamia glabra seeds that can be processed for animal nutrition.

entities.name: CATTLE FEED
entities.description: Nutritional feed for cattle, which can be provided by processed karanja cake meal.

entities.name: SOAP MAKING
entities.description: The industrial process of producing soap, in which karanja oil is utilized.

entities.name: FATTY ACIDS
entities.description: Chemical components found in karanja oil.
